headline: Are Medical Stocks Lagging  DexCom (DXCM) This Year?
summary: Here is how DexCom (DXCM) and Adaptive Biotechnologies (ADPT) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

headline: 2 Cash-Heavy Stocks on Our Buy List and 1 We Avoid
summary: A cash-heavy balance sheet is often a sign of strength, but not always. Some companies avoid debt because they have weak business models, limited expansion opportunities, or inconsistent cash flow.
